Items.Title: A Local Law in relation to a study and report on the processes for obtaining permits and licenses or registrations to operate a child care program
Items.MatterName: A study and report on the processes for obtaining permits and licenses or registrations to operate a child care program.

Items.Title: A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to an education and outreach campaign to enroll students in early childhood education programs
Items.MatterName: An education and outreach campaign to enroll students in early childhood education programs.

Items.Title: Resolution calling on the New York State Legislature to introduce and pass, and the Governor to sign, legislation to amend the Worker’s Compensation Law, in relation to allowing unused Paid Family Leave to be transferred to grandparents and other designated caregivers
Resolution calling on the New York State Legislature to pass, and the Governor to sign, S.4924/A.1303, to remove the minimum wage and hours requirements for applicants of child care assistance
Items.MatterName: Remove the minimum wage and hours requirements for applicants of child care assistance. (S.4924/A.1303)

Items.Title: AND SUCH OTHER BUSINESS AS MAY BE NECESSARY
Items.MatterName: AND SUCH OTHER BUSINESS AS MAY BE NECESSARY
